basic_details.job_title: DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Doctor Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya (DHSGSU) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website dhsgsu.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Sc. in Zoology or Biochemistry with minimum 55% marks and NET/GATE qualified.
qualification.details: M. Sc. in Zoology, Biochemistry with a minimum of 55% marks. NET/GATE or any other national-level examination as per ANRF guidelines.

salary_details.details: ₹37,000/- per month + 10% HRA for the first and second year. ₹42,000/- per month + 10% HRA for the third year.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHSGSU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M. Sc. in Zoology, Biochemistry with a minimum of 55% marks. NET/GATE or any other national-level examination as per ANRF guidelines.

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Age Limit 2026
DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Salary 2026
content_sections.text: ₹37,000/- per month + 10% HRA for the first and second year. ₹42,000/- per month + 10% HRA for the third year.

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on academic qualifications, research experience, and suitability. Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHSGSU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before 5:00 PM on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M. Sc. degree in Zoology or Biochemistry with a minimum of 55% marks. Additionally, they must have qualified for NET/GATE or any equivalent national-level examination.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their academic qualifications, research experience, and overall suitability, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is ₹37,000/- per month with 10% HRA for the first and second year, and ₹42,000/- per month with 10% HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. How should I send my application for the DHSGSU recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent as a single PDF file via email to the specified addresses and also by speed post to the Principal Investigator.

faq.question: Q7. What documents need to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of all relevant certificates, mark sheets, NET/GATE qualification certificate, experience certificates (if any), and a recent photograph.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ANRF/ZOO/0626/91.

faq.question: Q10. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Department of Zoology at Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya.
